note: Deterministic mutation operators applied by validate_negative_fixtures.py to every positive example part. Every generated mutant MUST be rejected by the hardened schemas. No randomness (mutants are enumerated exhaustively per operator), keeping CI deterministic.

operators.description: remove each top-level required field, one at a time
set each top-level enum-constrained field to the value 'NOT-A-LEGAL-VALUE'
add one undeclared top-level field '__mutant__': true

expectation: 0 surviving mutants (a surviving mutant = a mutant the schema still accepts)
